commands.openAs: Open as Mark My Mind (Markdown + MindMap)
commands.createNew: Create new mind map (.md from scratch)

ribbon.tooltip: Mark My Mind — Create or Open Map

toolbar.splitView:
Split View (Ctrl+\)
Editor left / MindMap right
toolbar.selectedTooltip:
Focus: Selected (S)
Always focuses on the block you select
toolbar.levelTooltip: Expand or collapse the nodes down to the selected depth level
toolbar.titlesOnlyTooltipAll:
View Titles Only (T)
Current mode: Show all (Text always visible)
toolbar.titlesOnlyTooltipSelected:
View Titles Only (T)
Current mode: Auto-expand selected (Shows text only for the selected block)
toolbar.titlesOnlyTooltipNone:
View Titles Only (T)
Current mode: Titles only (Text always hidden)
toolbar.singleH1RootTooltip:
H1 Title Aggregator (G)
On: Groups all title blocks (#H1) into a single flow.
Off: Separates title blocks (#H1) into individual flows.

popover.title: ⚙️ View Settings
popover.layoutColorsTooltip: Choose the map layout and how colors are applied to nodes
popover.layoutTooltip: Defines how nodes are organized: Horizontal, Vertical or Bidirectional
popover.colorsTooltip: Defines the color style of nodes: by depth level, by branch, or fixed
popover.lineFormTooltip: Controls the shape and thickness of the lines connecting nodes
popover.linesTooltip: Choose the line style: curved (smooth), rounded (soft angle) or straight
popover.thicknessTooltip: Thickness in pixels of the connecting lines. Default: 5
popover.blockSettingsTooltip: Adjust text size, block width and maximum height of nodes
popover.sizeTooltip: Font size in pixels used inside each node block
popover.widthTooltip: Default width of each node block. Use Auto for dynamic sizing
popover.maxHeightTooltip: Maximum height of node blocks. Use No Limit to show full content

donate.title: Mark My Mind - Made with Love! ❤️
donate.intro: Hi, I'm PHM, independent developer and creator of Mark My Mind!
donate.body: Mark My Mind took many hours of hard work and dedication, so if you feel grateful for my work, consider supporting me in development, so you encourage me to continue moving forward with this wonderful project ✨
donate.pixHeader: Support me with any amount whenever you want ❤️
donate.footer: Created with a lot of care and effort. Thank you for your support! ✨
donate.redirect: Redirecting to support page... Thank you so much! ❤️

layout.name: 📐 Default map layout
layout.desc: Defines how nodes are organized on the screen.

lineForm.name: 🧬 Line Form
lineForm.desc: Defines the appearance of lines connecting map nodes. Default: Rounded.

syncSpeed.name: ⚡ Sync speed (ms)
syncSpeed.desc: Wait time after typing before updating the map. Lower values = more responsive, but heavier.

autoOpen.name: 📂 Auto-open when clicking .md
autoOpen.desc: If enabled, opens Mark My Mind instead of the default editor for Markdown files.

showNoteText.name: 📝 Show paragraph text in nodes
showNoteText.desc: Displays paragraphs below headings as a note in the node.

maxHeight.name: 📏 Maximum block height (Size Limit)
maxHeight.desc: Defines the maximum allowed height for block notes (in pixels). Use 0 for No Limit.

fontSize.name: 🔤 Map font size
fontSize.desc: Defines the base font size for mind map blocks (in pixels).

nodeWidth.name: ↔️ Default block width
nodeWidth.desc: Defines the default block width (in pixels). Choose 0 for auto adjust (default 350px). Min 200px, max 800px.

lineSize.name: 📏 Line Size
lineSize.desc: Defines the thickness (in pixels) of the lines connecting map nodes. Default: 5. Limits: 1 to 10.

colorMode.name: 🎨 Map color mode
colorMode.desc: Defines how colors are applied to mind map blocks.

autoFocusOnSelect.name: 🎯 Auto focus on selected node
autoFocusOnSelect.desc: If enabled, the mind map will always center and focus the view on the node you select.

singleH1Root.name: 🌳 Multiple Main Blocks
singleH1Root.desc:
Multiple Main Blocks
(Have several separate blocks or Just a single "H1" block)

alignment.name: 📐 Default text alignment
alignment.desc: Defines how text is aligned inside the map blocks.
